scripts.cf:build:asset-worker: : ${MOJIDATA_SPA_ASSET_RELEASE:?Set MOJIDATA_SPA_ASSET_RELEASE to the R2 SPA asset release id} && NEXT_PUBLIC_SPA_ASSET_BASE_URL=${NEXT_PUBLIC_SPA_ASSET_BASE_URL:-https://mojidata-spa-assets.mandel59.workers.dev/releases/$MOJIDATA_SPA_ASSET_RELEASE} NEXT_PUBLIC_SPA_ASSET_VERSION=${NEXT_PUBLIC_SPA_ASSET_VERSION:-$MOJIDATA_SPA_ASSET_RELEASE} npm run cf:build
scripts.cf:deploy:asset-worker: npm run cf:build:asset-worker && npm run cf:deploy
scripts.crawl-spa:deploy: npm run crawl-spa:build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist/crawl-spa --project-name mojidata-crawl --branch cloudflare
scripts.crawl-spa:deploy:asset-worker: : ${MOJIDATA_SPA_ASSET_RELEASE:?Set MOJIDATA_SPA_ASSET_RELEASE to the R2 SPA asset release id} && MOJIDATA_CRAWL_SPA_ASSET_BASE_URL=${MOJIDATA_CRAWL_SPA_ASSET_BASE_URL:-https://mojidata-spa-assets.mandel59.workers.dev/releases/$MOJIDATA_SPA_ASSET_RELEASE} MOJIDATA_CRAWL_SPA_ASSET_VERSION=${MOJIDATA_CRAWL_SPA_ASSET_VERSION:-$MOJIDATA_SPA_ASSET_RELEASE} npm run crawl-spa:deploy
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
scripts.verify:ui:sequential: node scripts/run-sequential.mjs --cmd "npm run test:e2e:target -- -- 'tests/e2e/chrome-visual.spec.ts' --project=chromium" --cmd "npm run test:e2e:target -- -- 'tests/e2e/search-visual.spec.ts' --project=chromium" --cmd "npm run test:e2e:target -- -- 'tests/e2e/mojidata.spec.ts' --project=chromium --grep 'desktop mojidata keeps the TOC sidebar beside the main content|moji_joho display mode toggles without route refetch'" --cmd "npm run test:e2e:target -- -- 'tests/e2e/bot-rewrite.spec.ts' --project=chromium --grep 'mobile non-SPA search page can use search examples|mobile non-SPA search results page keeps form usable|mobile non-SPA idsfind results page keeps form usable'"
scripts.verify:style-system: node scripts/run-sequential.mjs --cmd "npm run build-storybook" --cmd "npm run storybook:smoke" --cmd "npm run storybook:visual" --cmd "npm run visual:compare"
